jobBoardUrls.title: Job Board URLs
jobBoardUrls.description: The list of job boards to scrape for identifying 'ghost' job listings.

daysThreshold.title: Ghost Listing Threshold (in Days)
daysThreshold.description: The number of days a job post can remain active before it's flagged as stale or a 'ghost listing'.

dateSelector.title: Date Field Selector
dateSelector.description: CSS selector or path to find job post publication or last updated date in the HTML.
